sections.label: Lyrics
lines: [Intro: Fingerstyle guitar with soft humming]
Oh, the seeds are sown in love divine,
In the garden of the heart, they shine.
[Verse 1: Gentle fingerstyle guitar, storytelling tone]
Love is the root, it binds us strong,
Joy lifts the weary with its song.
Peace like a river, calm and wide,
Patience walks slow, standing by our side.
[Pre-Chorus: Warm vocal harmonies build]
In every season, through storm and strife,
These fruits bloom bright in the soul of life.
[Chorus: Rich harmonies, heartfelt delivery]
Love, joy, peace, and patience grow,
Kindness and goodness overflow.
Faithfulness stands through the longest night,
Gentleness and self-control shine bright.
[Verse 2: Soft percussion enters, fingerstyle guitar continues]
Kindness whispers in the quiet place,
Goodness reflects in each tender face.
Faithfulness holds when the world turns cold,
Gentleness comforts, steady and bold.
[Pre-Chorus: Builds anticipation]
The Spirit’s gifts, a sacred design,
A tapestry woven in hearts aligned.
[Chorus: Repeat with added harmonies]
Love, joy, peace, and patience grow,
Kindness and goodness overflow.
Faithfulness stands through the longest night,
Gentleness and self-control shine bright.
[Bridge: Stripped back to guitar, reflective tone]
In the quiet soil of humility,
The Spirit plants seeds of eternity.
Harvesting a love so true,
The fruits of the Spirit carry us through.
[Chorus: Climactic and uplifting]
Love, joy, peace, and patience grow,
Kindness and goodness overflow.
Faithfulness stands through the longest night,
Gentleness and self-control shine bright.
[Outro: Fingerstyle guitar fades softly]
Oh, the seeds are sown in love divine,
In the garden of the heart, they shine.
